advantages: Pinpoints the *line* (or call chain) that allocated the elephant.
tracemalloc is built-in; zero install needed for first investigation.
memray gives flamegraphs, leak-suspects view and live mode.
Snapshot diffs (`compare_to`) cleanly identify leak suspects.
Enables evidence-based choice between numpy / list / mmap / quantization.
disadvantages: Heavier overhead than cProfile — be selective about region traced.
C-extension allocations (numpy, FAISS) may be summarized as one allocation site.
Snapshot interpretation has a learning curve (peak vs current, gc effects).
memray binaries can grow large quickly on long runs (limit duration or sample rate).
Production use needs care — tracemalloc has overhead, memray needs explicit setup.
